description: Risk assessment is documented but does not include threat catalog updates from the last 12 months.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from RA-3 deviation.
recommendation: Update risk assessment per 800-30 Rev 1; include current threat catalog.

description: Quarterly account review (AC-2 base control, statement j — review accounts for compliance) was not performed for the last 4 quarters; logs show no review activity.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from the AC-2 (account review, element j) deviation.
recommendation: Re-perform account review; implement a calendar-tracked quarterly task with sign-off in the GRC tool.

description: Password policy does not enforce minimum length of 12 characters.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from IA-5(1) deviation.
recommendation: Update password policy; deploy to identity provider.
compensating_control: Manual review process exists but is not fully effective.

description: SSP is up-to-date but does not include a section on supply chain risk management.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from PL-2 deviation.
recommendation: Add SR family section to SSP.

description: Boundary protection is configured but 17 rules are not reviewed in the last 90 days.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from SC-7 deviation.
recommendation: Schedule quarterly firewall rule review; document in change management.

description: Flaw remediation — 2 high-severity vulnerabilities are past the patch SLA.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from SI-2 deviation.
recommendation: Patch or document compensating control; update POA&M.

description: Application-layer audit events for 6 event types are not enabled.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from AU-2 deviation.
recommendation: Enable application-layer audit events; forward to central SIEM.
compensating_control: Manual review process exists but is not fully effective.

description: Malware protection is deployed; last signature update check was 6 days ago.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from SI-3 deviation.
recommendation: Add daily signature-update check to monitoring.

description: Incident response plan is documented but does not include automation for the eradication step.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from IR-4 deviation.
recommendation: Add automation to the IRP; document in runbook.

description: Controlled maintenance procedure is documented but maintenance logs are not consistently captured.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from MA-2 deviation.
recommendation: Update maintenance log template; train IT staff.
compensating_control: Manual review process exists but is not fully effective.

description: Boundary protection is configured but 25 rules are not reviewed in the last 90 days.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from SC-7 deviation.
recommendation: Schedule quarterly firewall rule review; document in change management.

description: Contingency plan is documented but has not been tested in the last 9 months.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from CP-2 deviation.
recommendation: Schedule and execute contingency plan test.

description: Boundary protection is configured but 8 rules are not reviewed in the last 90 days.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from SC-7 deviation.
recommendation: Schedule quarterly firewall rule review; document in change management.

description: Account usage conditions are not documented in the user account agreement.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from AC-2(11) deviation.
recommendation: Add usage conditions to the account agreement; track in HRMS.
compensating_control: Manual review process exists but is not fully effective.

description: Supply chain risk assessment is documented but has not been refreshed in the last 12 months.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from SR-3 deviation.
recommendation: Refresh supply chain risk assessment; include new vendors.

description: Malware protection is deployed; last signature update check was 13 days ago.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from SI-3 deviation.
recommendation: Add daily signature-update check to monitoring.

description: Media sanitization procedure is documented but not consistently followed.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from MP-6 deviation.
recommendation: Refresh training; add compliance check to media disposal workflow.

description: Incident response plan is documented but does not include automation for the eradication step.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from IR-4 deviation.
recommendation: Add automation to the IRP; document in runbook.
compensating_control: Manual review process exists but is not fully effective.

description: Audit log protection against tampering is configured but not tested.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from AU-9 deviation.
recommendation: Add quarterly test of log integrity protection.

description: Boundary protection is configured but 25 rules are not reviewed in the last 90 days.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from SC-7 deviation.
recommendation: Schedule quarterly firewall rule review; document in change management.

description: Incident response plan is documented but does not include automation for the recovery step.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from IR-4 deviation.
recommendation: Add automation to the IRP; document in runbook.

description: System monitoring — automated tools are deployed but do not include threat intelligence feed.
effect: Risk to system confidentiality, integrity, or availability from SI-4(2) deviation.
recommendation: Deploy additional monitoring capability; document in monitoring strategy.
